steps.title: Find the shared trait
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between Erasure and Home Grown. The notes show that many of Ramos's sculptures use discarded objects, and both named works include discarded objects in their materials.

steps.title: Eliminate contrast and background
steps.content: Choice A says Erasure uses discarded audiocassette tapes and magnets, while Home Grown includes pushpins, plastic plates and forks, and wood; the word however emphasizes difference. Choice B gives background about Ramos's exhibitions but does not name both works.

steps.title: Choose the shared-object sentence
steps.content: Choice D only says Ramos completed Erasure in 2008 and Home Grown in 2009, which gives dates rather than a similarity. Choice C names both works and states that both include discarded objects, with one example from each. The answer is C.
